claims.summary: ExperienceDeltaKindV1 needs more granular vocabulary for tiny or lingering transitions that are not well captured by ComplexShift or CascadeShift.
SpectralDimensionV1 should support a contextual scaffold anchor so placement can be tethered to known structure, not only a base dimension number.
Retuning RESONANCE_STABILITY foothold/fluctuation weights would test whether density of placement depends on the current constants.
